# TiledStyleDefinition.TypeTagNSlice field

`TypeHash("NSlice")` — the N-slice (9-slice) composition variant. The common TiledStyle shape (7 of 8 records dumped during FR-C14 R8). Fully decoded by [`Parse`](./Parse.md) (FR-C14 R10).
